raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu winnu uſmoh-
dinaſs tahs Taifnibas deht/ un
wiſſus winna Zeltus es lihde-
nus darritchu. Wiſch uſtai-
ſihs mannu Pilsfahtu/ un at-
laſtihs mannis Zeetumneekug/
ne par Maſfu un ne par Dah-
wanahm/ faſka tas KUNGS
Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta faſka tas KUNGS:
To Egiptexu Padohms/ ta
Prezzefchana to Mohra-Lauschu
un Sabecku to garru Wihru
pabrees pee tewim/ un peeder-
rehs tewi/ un staigahs tewi pak-
kak/ ar Pinnekteein tee nahks
pahri/ un klannifees preeſsch te-
wi/ tee peeluhgß tewi/(un faz-
zibs:) Teefchain/ Deews irr ar
tewim/ un ne irr wairak netahds
zits Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pateeft/ tu eſſi weens
apflehpts Deeis/ tu Ifraeta
Deews/tu Peſtitajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee taps Kauna un par
Apfmeekli/ wiſſt tee/ tee aisees
kahpa ar Kaunu/ kas Elka-Dee-
wus darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Ifraels tohp atpe-
ſihts zaur to KUNGU ar wee-
nu muhſchign Peſtifchann/ juhs
ne tapfeet Kauna/ nedß par Ap-
tmeekli muhſchigi muhſcham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta faſka tas KUNGS/
kas to Debbeſi irr raddijs/ tas
Deews kas to Semmi irr iſtat-
fifs/ un to irr padarrijs/ wiſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "irr to ſtiprinaje/ wiſch to ne irr
raddijs/ ka ta tukſcha paliftu/
bet wiſch irr to iſtatfijs/ ka eekſch
tahs bij dſilwoht: Es eſmu tas
KUNGS/ un neweens zits
wairak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es ne eſmu tleppeni run-
najs kahda tumſcha Semmes
Weeta. Es ne eſmu us Jehkaba
Oſimmumu fazzijs: Meklejeet
manni welſi/ es eſmu tas
KUNGS/ kas to Taifnibu run-
na/ un stahſta pareisaß Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sapulzejeeteß un nah-
zeet/ ateita koypa juhs Jsglahb-
tee no teem Paganeem/ winni
ne ſinn neneeka/ kas ſawas iſ-
greestas Kohka Bildes nefia/ un
weenu Deewu peeluhdß/ kas iſ-
peſtiht ne mahß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sluddinajeet/ un ateita
kaht/ farunnajteeß koypa. Kas
irr to ſinnanu darrijs no wez-
zeem Laikceem/ kas irr to no ta
Bribscha ſtahſtis? Wojes ne eſ-
mu tas KUNGS? un ne irr
zits Deeis wairak/ bes ka es
ween/ weens taihnajs Deeis/
un weens Peſtitajs/ neweens irr
ka Es ween.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Greeſeeteß pee manniß/
tad tapfeet juhs peſiti wiſſas
Pafautes Galli/ jo es eſmu
Deeis/ un zits neweens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es eſmu ſwehrejs pee fe-
wis paſcha/ weens taiſns R
Wahrds irr no mannas Muttes
iſgahjis/ un tas ne atgreeſifees/
wiſſi Zetti preeſsch manni lohzi-
R
fees/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
